steps.name: Request Made
steps.input: Client: RoomWise Property Management. Co-living rooms for rent in Dallas, TX. Build homepage wireframe.
steps.output: Request logged. Context pulled from Reverb and web research.

steps.name: Pull Client Context
steps.output: Business: Co-living rental. Weekly payments via Stripe. Membership model. Multiple Dallas properties (6-10 rooms each). No exact addresses shown (regulatory constraint). CTA: Schedule a Tour. Tone: Approachable, community-focused.

steps.name: Build Wireframe
steps.input: RoomWise context, 9-section homepage: Nav → Hero → How It Works → Available Rooms → Why RoomWise → Testimonials → FAQ → CTA Banner → Footer. 1440px wide, vertical auto-layout, all copy in text nodes.
steps.output: https://www.figma.com/design/DGDekYKD1DOrP7GeEWKxjK — 9 sections complete, 64 text nodes updated with DME copy

steps.name: Self-Healing QA Loop
steps.output: QA Issues Found — CRITICAL (2): 1) Hero stat collision: stats (800+, 4500+) overlay headline text making both illegible. 2) Testimonials section: all 3 cards show [Resident testimonial placeholder] and Resident Name. MEDIUM (3): Footer shows Logo placeholder text. Nav has generic black square placeholder logo. Move In Fast feature row missing description text. LOW (3): Small text under Real-Time Room Availability. CTA placement ambiguity in value prop section. Map pins lack color legend. Client must provide: real testimonials, actual logo, real stats without collision fix.
